seo.metaTitle: White-Label Domains Platform for Service Providers | Hostopia
seo.metaDescription: Sell and manage domains under your brand. Hostopia's white-label platform turns every domain registration into a long-term SMB relationship with email, web, and security.

hero.headline: Every SMB Relationship Starts with a Domain — Make Sure It Starts with You
hero.subheadline: Domains are where SMBs choose who powers their digital presence. When that first registration happens on your platform, everything else follows — email, websites, security, and growth services.
hero.description: Hostopia's white-label Domains platform lets you sell and manage domains under your brand, then seamlessly attach the services that drive long-term revenue and loyalty.

items.title: Find their perfect domain
items.body: Intelligent search across 24+ extensions — from .com and .net to country-specific TLDs like .ca, .mx, and .us — plus premium domain options.

items.title: Look professional instantly
items.body: Domain-based email tied to their business name builds credibility from day one.

items.title: Manage everything in one place
items.body: DNS, forwarding, auto-renewals, and expiration tracking from a single branded dashboard.

items.title: Expand when ready
items.body: Add websites, SSL, ecommerce, and marketing services seamlessly — all tied to their domain.

features.heading: A Complete Domain Platform — Under Your Brand
features.intro: White-label search, registration, management, and upsell — fully branded with your logo, URL, and pricing.

cards.title: Smart Domain Search & Registration
cards.body: Intelligent search with suggestions when first choices are taken, 24+ TLDs, flexible 1-10 year terms, and premium domain options from trusted secondary markets.

cards.title: Integrated Domain-Based Email
cards.body: Professional email tied to the customer's domain activates immediately after registration — the highest-attach service in the portfolio.

cards.title: Full Domain Management
cards.body: DNS settings, forwarding, auto-renewals, expiration tracking, and bulk domain transfers — everything SMBs and partners need from one dashboard.

cards.title: Right-Time Engagement Triggers
cards.body: Automated in-app and email prompts after domain purchase — 'Add email,' 'Create a website,' 'Secure with SSL' — driving upsell at the moment of highest intent.

partnerAdvantage.heading: Your Easiest Path to Acquisition — and Your Best Lever for Retention
partnerAdvantage.intro: Domains are a low-cost entry point that feeds your entire digital services portfolio. Every registration is an opportunity to build a multi-product relationship.

items.title: Anchor customers from day one
items.body: Domains are the most critical digital asset an SMB owns. When it lives on your platform, your brand is embedded at the foundation of their online presence.

items.title: Drive natural upsell
items.body: Domain → email → website → SSL → ecommerce → marketing. The attach sequence is proven, and right-time engagement triggers automate the upsell motion.

items.title: Reduce churn structurally
items.body: Migrating a domain is high-friction. Customers with a domain, email, and website on your platform have three reasons to stay — not just one.

items.title: Skip the registrar build
items.body: Hostopia provides registrar infrastructure, DNS, management tools, and operations across 34 countries and 14 languages. You own the brand and the commercial model.

lifecycleFit.heading: The Starting Point for Every SMB Journey
lifecycleFit.intro: Domains sit at the very start of your lifecycle framework — the first product an SMB buys, and the anchor that connects everything else.

steps.title: Build a Brand
steps.body: Register the domain and activate domain-based email. This is where the relationship begins.

steps.title: Get Online
steps.body: Add a website with Online Presence Builder, DIFM design, or custom development.

steps.title: Get Found
steps.body: Layer on SEO, directory listings, and reputation management.

steps.title: Grow
steps.body: Expand into ecommerce, email marketing, and advanced digital services.

lifecycleFit.positioning: Position domains as the 'start here' product — the low-cost, high-attach entry point that feeds website, email, security, and marketing upsell across the entire SMB lifecycle.

cta.headline: Ready to Turn Domains into Your Next Growth Engine?
cta.body: Connect with Hostopia to launch your branded domain platform, bundle domains with email and web services, and turn every registration into a long-term SMB relationship.
